utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- health_coverage: Specifies both physical and mental health insurance with individual costs and a total (€100/month, €65/month, total €165/month) – fully specified with costs.
- property_coverage: Specifies home/contents insurance with cost (€60/month) – fully specified with costs.
- travel_coverage: Specifies travel insurance with cost (€50/month) – fully specified with costs.
- additional_services: Specifies an enhancement service (Adventure Travel Coverage add-on) with cost (€80/month); also notes a service that could not be arranged, which doesn’t negate the provided add-on – sufficiently specified with cost.
- total_budget: Provides a complete monthly total (€355/month). No annual breakdown, but the format says monthly/annual, so monthly is acceptable. All items are present and include costs.
